summary: TWO_COLUMN: condition number κ=σ_max/σ_min for 3 matrices I (κ=1), diag(3, 0.3) (κ=10), diag(10, 0.01) (κ=1000). LEFT plots unit circle + 3 output ellipses in BLUE/GREEN/RED. ValueTracker θ_tr sweeps probe angle; always_redraw dots on each. RIGHT shows live error-amplification ratio |Aδx|/|Ax| per matrix — max approaches κ.
